Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions An Order Strikign Defts Answer And Entering Default On Ptlf'S

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
Plaintiff CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion for Terminating Sanctions and Order Striking Defendants Answer and Entering Default on Plaintiffs is Granted, no opposition. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Charles O. Geerhart; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Wohl, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Discovery Responses And Req. For Sanctions; Ntc Of Non Appearance
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion to Compel Discovery Responses is GRANTED; no opposition filed. Request for Sanctions is GRANTED; $200 imposed against Defendant. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To May-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions is continued to May 23, 2013 to give both parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Both parties must deliver courtesy copies of all papers filing support of and opposition to the motion to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 14, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported. =(302/JPT)
